summary.goal: Remove dead LlmConfig code and update LLM string references throughout the codebase
decisions: Removed LlmConfig struct and Config.llm field from models.rs — confirmed dead code with no call sites
Updated string literals in main.rs (about, context doc comment) and graph.rs (header) to drop LLM terminology
Updated README.md to use neutral language; CLAUDE.md left intact since its LLM references describe tool purpose and agent directives accurately
